notes: Hybrid paper: dominant content is a narrative survey plus the proposed SAFE-AI governance framework and a novel taxonomy of AI behaviors (conceptual). It also carries out a real empirical evaluation pipeline (Sec IX-X): benchmarking six code-LLMs for vulnerabilities/hallucinations and simulating autonomous agents (failure/deception/recovery metrics, ANOVA), and claims a 30K synthetic-prompt dataset (Re-Auto-30K). Empirical=true rests on this benchmark/simulation. No human participants (models and synthetic prompts only). Reference list appears largely mismatched/unreliable, but this does not change the method classification.
